# Realness Online

> Rotoscope photos into layered SVG posters — mosaics, shadows, and gradients. On-device classical computer vision, no AI. Small-community social network for artists.

Realness traces photos into animatable vector posters. Export SVG, PNG, PSD, video, or GLB. Print on transparency film and stack like cel animation. Sign in with a phone number to sync with a small instance community.

## Primary documentation

- [User guide (HTML)](https://realness.online/docs): Full how-to — interface, posters, Thoughts feed, exports, sync, install
- [User guide (Markdown)](https://realness.online/documentation.md): Same guide as plain markdown for tools and crawlers

## What Realness is

- [About](https://realness.online/about): Product overview, features, who it is for

## Hosting and licensing

- [Pricing](https://realness.online/pricing): Free tier and license plans for teams

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](https://realness.online/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://realness.online/privacy)

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/realness-online/web): Deploy your own instance
